get.description: Public health endpoint aggregating gateway, worker, and database status.

post.description: Create a new orchestration thread and dispatch to the worker.

get.description: List orchestration threads with pagination and optional status filter.
Return the full ThreadMetadata object for a thread.

delete.description: Hard-delete a thread and all cascading artifacts.

post.description: Transition a thread to ARCHIVED status.

get.description: Stream thread events over SSE for clients that do not use WebSockets.

Return a complete thread state snapshot for client reconnection.

The ``last_sequence`` field enables gap detection: the client discards
any subsequent WebSocket events with ``sequence <= last_sequence``
(ADR-011 section 2.3).

post.description:
Send a user message into an existing thread.

Returns 202 Accepted immediately; the message is dispatched to the
worker process for graph execution (ADR-019).
Cancel a running thread by dispatching a cancel action to the worker.

get.description: Return current team status: agents, active threads, pending permissions.
Return all available team presets for the team picker UI.

post.description: Submit a permission response via REST for guaranteed delivery.

schema.title: Response Shutdown Endpoint Api Admin Shutdown Post

get.description: Readiness probe -- confirms the internal API is accepting connections.

schema.title: Response Internal Health Internal Health Get

post.description:
Receive a single event from the worker and relay to browser clients.

The ``WorkerBridge`` in the worker process POSTs here instead of
sending a WebSocket frame.  The payload format matches
``WorkerEventEnvelope``.

schema.title: Response Receive Worker Event Internal Events Post

post.description:
Receive a batch of events from the worker (CRIT-02).

The ``WorkerBridge`` accumulates events for a short interval then
POSTs them as a single ``{"events": [...]}`` payload.  Each entry
has the same shape as a single-event envelope (``thread_id`` +
``payload``).

schema.title: Response Receive Worker Event Batch Internal Events Batch Post

post.description:
Receive a heartbeat from the worker.

Updates ``app.state`` so the gateway can monitor worker
liveness without a persistent WebSocket connection.

schema.title: Response Receive Worker Heartbeat Internal Heartbeat Post

get.description:
Top-level liveness check for external probes.

`/health` stays green when the gateway process is alive. Aggregate
dependency readiness is exposed separately via `/api/health`.

AgentLifecycleState.title: AgentLifecycleState
AgentLifecycleState.description:
Observable agent states exposed to the frontend.

Maps to ADR-003 MCP states. Distinct from ``AgentState`` which tracks
internal process lifecycle (init/ready/running/error/done).

AgentStatusEntry.title: AgentStatusEntry
AgentStatusEntry.description: Agent status within a team status response.

ContextRef.title: ContextRef
ContextRef.description: Reference to a context document in the .vault hierarchy.

CreateThreadResponse.title: CreateThreadResponse
CreateThreadResponse.description: Response after successfully creating a thread.

ExecutionTaskSnapshot.title: ExecutionTaskSnapshot
ExecutionTaskSnapshot.description: Normalized execution task used in reconnect snapshots.

MessageSnapshot.title: MessageSnapshot
MessageSnapshot.description: Fully materialized message in a thread replay.

Model.title: Model
Model.description:
LLM capability levels.

Abstracts specific version strings to reduce maintenance burden.

PermissionOptionKind.title: PermissionOptionKind
PermissionOptionKind.description:
User permission response options (mirrors ACP PermissionOption.kind).

Values:
    ALLOW_ONCE: Allow the tool call this time only.
    ALLOW_ALWAYS: Allow all future invocations of this tool without prompting.
    REJECT_ONCE: Deny the tool call this time only.
    REJECT_ALWAYS: Deny all future invocations of this tool without prompting.

PermissionResponseRequest.title: PermissionResponseRequest
PermissionResponseRequest.description: Submit a permission response via REST (guaranteed delivery).

PermissionResponseResult.title: PermissionResponseResult
PermissionResponseResult.description: Result of submitting a permission response.

SendMessageRequest.title: SendMessageRequest
SendMessageRequest.description: Send a user message into an existing thread via REST.

SendMessageResponse.title: SendMessageResponse
SendMessageResponse.description: Response after accepting a user message (202 Accepted).

TeamPresetSummary.title: TeamPresetSummary
TeamPresetSummary.description: Lightweight team preset descriptor for the team picker UI (ADR-013 �6).

TeamPresetsResponse.title: TeamPresetsResponse
TeamPresetsResponse.description: Response for GET /teams: list of available team presets (ADR-013 �6).

TeamStatusResponse.title: TeamStatusResponse
TeamStatusResponse.description: Current team status snapshot via REST.

ThreadMetadata.title: ThreadMetadata
ThreadMetadata.description: Provenance and context attached to an orchestration thread.

ThreadStateSnapshot.title: ThreadStateSnapshot
ThreadStateSnapshot.description:
Complete thread state for reconnection replay.

The client fetches this via REST, notes ``last_sequence``, then
discards any WebSocket events with ``sequence <= last_sequence``.

ThreadStatus.title: ThreadStatus
ThreadStatus.description: Durable lifecycle states for orchestration threads.

ThreadSummary.title: ThreadSummary
ThreadSummary.description: Lightweight thread descriptor for list endpoints.

ToolCallContentDiff.title: ToolCallContentDiff
ToolCallContentDiff.description: Diff content block within a tool call.

ToolCallContentTerminal.title: ToolCallContentTerminal
ToolCallContentTerminal.description: Terminal output content block within a tool call.

ToolCallContentText.title: ToolCallContentText
ToolCallContentText.description: Plain text content block within a tool call.

ToolCallLocation.title: ToolCallLocation
ToolCallLocation.description: File location associated with a tool call.

ToolCallSnapshot.title: ToolCallSnapshot
ToolCallSnapshot.description: Fully materialized tool call (all incremental updates merged).

ToolCallStatus.title: ToolCallStatus
ToolCallStatus.description: Lifecycle states for a single tool invocation.

_AgentSnapshot.title: _AgentSnapshot
_AgentSnapshot.description: Agent state within a thread snapshot.

_PermissionSnapshot.title: _PermissionSnapshot
_PermissionSnapshot.description: Outstanding permission request in a state snapshot.
